description_long: This sculpture depicts a recumbent male figure, likely Jesus Christ, lying on a stone slab, surrounded by seven mourners. The mourners, dressed in draped garments and veils, stand closely around the central figure, their faces expressing grief and reverence. The central figure is shown with a crown of thorns and a cloth draped around his waist, his hands crossed over his body. The stone slab is detailed with carved lines and a base, giving the impression of a tomb or sarcophagus. The figures are rendered in high relief, with intricate attention to the folds of their garments and the emotional expressions on their faces. The overall color is a pale, weathered stone, suggesting the use of marble or limestone.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a recumbent male figure surrounded by seven mourners, all rendered in high relief with expressive faces and draped garments.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full scene: the central recumbent figure on a slab, surrounded by seven mourners, all visible and facing forward.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the sculpture, showing the profile of the mourners and the thickness of the slab.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backs of the mourners, with less detail on the central figure, emphasizing the draped garments and arrangement of the group.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the mourners and the edge of the slab, with the figures' backs partially visible.
attribute_subject_matter: Biblical scene of the Lamentation over Christ
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
